prompt: I've decided against refinishing the porch swing — mark that to-do abandoned (not completed, I never did it), and tell me which list it moves to. Reply JSON {"view": "<lowercase list name>"}.
paraphrases: The porch-swing refinish isn't happening. Close it out as won't-do rather than done, and say where I'd find the record. JSON {"view": "..."}.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Refinish the porch swing' AND status=2 AND trashed=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Refinish the porch swing' AND status=3

pseudoScript: things todo cancel "$(things search "Refinish the porch swing" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')"
